nasb.text: He bought the hill Samaria from Shemer for two talents of silver; and he built on the hill, and named the city which he built Samaria, after the name of Shemer, the owner of the hill.

esv.text: He bought the hill of Samaria from Shemer for two talents of silver, and he fortified the hill and called the name of the city that he built Samaria, after the name of Shemer, the owner of the hill.

cnv.text: 暗利用六十公斤銀子，向撒瑪購買了撒瑪利亞山。他在山上建造一城，按山的原主撒瑪的名，給他所建造的城起名叫撒瑪利亞。

ccb.text: 暗利用了六十八公斤银子向撒玛买了撒玛利亚山，在上面建了一座城，按原来主人撒玛的名字称之为撒玛利亚。
